metadata.convention: Perturbation of a gene/allele compared to appropriate baseline (WT for single perturbations; mutant-alone for rescue experiments). Direction: increased=taller plant, decreased=shorter (dwarf), unchanged=comparable to WT. Common wheat cultivars (Mercia, Maris Huntsman, Maringa, Halberd, Fielder, Bobwhite) used as tall WT backgrounds.

evidence.title: Molecular Characterization of Rht-1 Dwarfing Genes in Hexaploid Wheat
evidence.authors: Pearce S, Saville R, Vaughan SP, Chandler PM, Wilhelm EP, Sparks CA, Al-Kaff N, Korolev A, Boulton MI, Phillips AL, Hedden P, Nicholson P, Thomas SG
evidence.evidence_sentence: the Rht-B1b and Rht-D1b alleles produce only about a 20% reduction in height

evidence.title: The Impact of the Wheat Rht-B1b Semi-Dwarfing Allele on Photosynthesis and Seed Development Under Field Conditions
evidence.authors: Jobson EM, Johnston RE, Oiestad AJ, Martin JM, Giroux MJ
evidence.evidence_sentence: Plant height (cm) 95.0 (Rht-B1a) vs 73.1 (Rht-B1b), -23% reduction significant
evidence.claim: Rht-B1b reduces height 23% in Montana field trial

evidence.title: Molecular Characterization of Rht-1 Dwarfing Genes in Hexaploid Wheat
evidence.authors: Pearce S, Saville R, Vaughan SP, Chandler PM, Wilhelm EP, Sparks CA, Al-Kaff N, Korolev A, Boulton MI, Phillips AL, Hedden P, Nicholson P, Thomas SG
evidence.evidence_sentence: the Rht-B1b and Rht-D1b alleles produce only about a 20% reduction in height

evidence.title: Molecular Characterization of Rht-1 Dwarfing Genes in Hexaploid Wheat
evidence.authors: Pearce S, Saville R, Vaughan SP, Chandler PM, Wilhelm EP, Sparks CA, Al-Kaff N, Korolev A, Boulton MI, Phillips AL, Hedden P, Nicholson P, Thomas SG
evidence.evidence_sentence: Rht-B1c and Rht-D1c are about half the size of the appropriate tall controls

evidence.title: Molecular Characterization of Rht-1 Dwarfing Genes in Hexaploid Wheat
evidence.authors: Pearce S, Saville R, Vaughan SP, Chandler PM, Wilhelm EP, Sparks CA, Al-Kaff N, Korolev A, Boulton MI, Phillips AL, Hedden P, Nicholson P, Thomas SG
evidence.evidence_sentence: the extreme dwarfism of Rht-D1c is due to overexpression of the semidwarfing Rht-D1b allele, caused by an increase in gene copy number
evidence.claim: Rht-D1c extreme dwarf via gene amplification

evidence.title: Molecular Characterization of Rht-1 Dwarfing Genes in Hexaploid Wheat
evidence.authors: Pearce S, Saville R, Vaughan SP, Chandler PM, Wilhelm EP, Sparks CA, Al-Kaff N, Korolev A, Boulton MI, Phillips AL, Hedden P, Nicholson P, Thomas SG
evidence.evidence_sentence: Plants carrying the Rht-B1d mutation are less severely dwarfed than those carrying Rht-B1b alone

evidence.title: Molecular Characterization of Rht-1 Dwarfing Genes in Hexaploid Wheat
evidence.authors: Pearce S, Saville R, Vaughan SP, Chandler PM, Wilhelm EP, Sparks CA, Al-Kaff N, Korolev A, Boulton MI, Phillips AL, Hedden P, Nicholson P, Thomas SG
evidence.evidence_sentence: it is likely that the Rht-B1e mutation confers its GA-insensitive semidwarf phenotype in a manner analogous to Rht-B1b

evidence.title: Green Revolution dwarfing Rht genes negatively affected wheat floral traits related to cross-pollination efficiency
evidence.authors: Schierenbeck M, Alqudah AM, Lantos E, Avogadro EG, Simon MR, Borner A
evidence.evidence_sentence: The Rht1+2 combination produced reductions up to 64% compared to the tall variety
evidence.claim: Rht-B1b+Rht-D1b double dwarf; up to 64% reduction

evidence.title: Molecular Characterization of Rht-1 Dwarfing Genes in Hexaploid Wheat
evidence.authors: Pearce S, Saville R, Vaughan SP, Chandler PM, Wilhelm EP, Sparks CA, Al-Kaff N, Korolev A, Boulton MI, Phillips AL, Hedden P, Nicholson P, Thomas SG
evidence.evidence_sentence: wild-type alleles designated as Rht-A1a, Rht-B1a, and Rht-D1a

evidence.title: Molecular Characterization of Rht-1 Dwarfing Genes in Hexaploid Wheat
evidence.authors: Pearce S, Saville R, Vaughan SP, Chandler PM, Wilhelm EP, Sparks CA, Al-Kaff N, Korolev A, Boulton MI, Phillips AL, Hedden P, Nicholson P, Thomas SG
evidence.evidence_sentence: Rht-D1a (tall)

evidence.title: Differential coupling of gibberellin responses by Rht-B1c suppressor alleles and Rht-B1b in wheat highlights a unique role for the DELLA N-terminus in dormancy
evidence.authors: Van De Velde K, Chandler PM, Van Der Straeten D, Rohde A
evidence.evidence_sentence: Rht-B1c.22 (tall): stem length 15-22% longer than Rht-B1b
evidence.claim: ovg suppressor restores tall stature in Rht-B1c background

evidence.title: Wheat plant height locus RHT25 encodes a PLATZ transcription factor that interacts with DELLA (RHT1)
evidence.authors: Zhang Z, Belcram H, Gornicki P, Charles M, Just J, Huneau C, Magdelenat G, Couloux A, Samain S, Gill BS, Rasmussen JB, Barbe V, Faris JD, Chalhoub B
evidence.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences USA
evidence.evidence_sentence: combined platz1 mutant showed a significant reduction in plant height (12.7%), peduncle length (18.7%)

evidence.title: Wheat plant height locus RHT25 encodes a PLATZ transcription factor that interacts with DELLA (RHT1)
evidence.authors: Zhang Z, Belcram H, Gornicki P, Charles M, Just J, Huneau C, Magdelenat G, Couloux A, Samain S, Gill BS, Rasmussen JB, Barbe V, Faris JD, Chalhoub B
evidence.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences USA
evidence.evidence_sentence: UBI::PLATZ1 overexpression: Taller plants; longer peduncles; male sterile

evidence.title: GIBBERELLIN 3-OXIDASE genes regulate height and grain size in bread wheat
evidence.authors: Phillips AL, Huttly AK, Alarcon-Reverte R, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: ga3ox2 triple mutant: GA1 levels ~3-fold lower than wild-type in seedlings; severely dwarfed, infertile

evidence.title: GIBBERELLIN 3-OXIDASE genes regulate height and grain size in bread wheat
evidence.authors: Phillips AL, Huttly AK, Alarcon-Reverte R, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: ga3ox3 Mutants: 3.0-4.5 cm shorter than wild-type; grain width/TGW reduced

evidence.title: GIBBERELLIN 3-OXIDASE genes regulate height and grain size in bread wheat
evidence.authors: Phillips AL, Huttly AK, Alarcon-Reverte R, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: ga1ox1 Mutant: Bioactive GA1/GA4 extremely high; 10.7 cm taller in 2021 field trial

evidence.title: GIBBERELLIN 3-OXIDASE genes regulate height and grain size in bread wheat
evidence.authors: Phillips AL, Huttly AK, Alarcon-Reverte R, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: twice-weekly sprays of 10 μM GA3 almost completely restored the height and fertility

evidence.title: Dominant and Pleiotropic Effects of a GAI Gene in Wheat Results from a Lack of Interaction between DELLA and GID1
evidence.authors: Wu J, Kong X, Wan J, Liu X, Zhang X, Guo X, Zhou R, Zhao G, Jing R, Fu X, Jia J
evidence.evidence_sentence: Wild-type seedlings increased 30% with GA3 treatment
evidence.claim: Exogenous GA3 promotes elongation in WT

evidence.title: Dominant and Pleiotropic Effects of a GAI Gene in Wheat Results from a Lack of Interaction between DELLA and GID1
evidence.authors: Wu J, Kong X, Wan J, Liu X, Zhang X, Guo X, Zhou R, Zhao G, Jing R, Fu X, Jia J
evidence.evidence_sentence: Rht-B1c showed only 5% non-significant increase, confirming complete GA insensitivity

evidence.title: Rht18 Semidwarfism in Wheat Is Due to Increased GA 2-oxidaseA9 Expression and Reduced GA Content
evidence.authors: Ford BA, Foo E, Sharwood R, Karafiatova M, Vrana J, MacMillan C, Nichols DS, Steuernagel B, Uauy C, Dolezel J, Chandler PM, Spielmeyer W
evidence.evidence_sentence: Rht18, a dominant and gibberellin (GA) responsive mutant, is genetically and functionally distinct from the widely used GA-insensitive semidwarfing genes
evidence.claim: Rht18 dominant GA-responsive dwarf via TaGA2ox-A9

evidence.title: Rht24b, an ancient variation of TaGA2ox-A9, reduces plant height without yield penalty in wheat
evidence.authors: Tian X, Xia X, Xu D, Liu Y, Xie L, Hassan MA, Song J, Li F, Wang D, Zhang Y, Hao Y, Li G, Chu C, He Z, Cao S
evidence.evidence_sentence: Rht24b reduced plant height, but had no yield penalty; it significantly increased nitrogen use efficiency, photosynthetic rate and the expression of related genes

evidence.title: A modern Green Revolution gene for reduced height in wheat
evidence.authors: Wurschum T, Langer SM, Longin CFH, Tucker MR, Leiser WL
evidence.evidence_sentence: exerting an allele substitution effect of -8.8 cm

evidence.title: Overgrowth mutants determine the causal role of gibberellin GA2oxidaseA13 in Rht12 dwarfism of wheat
evidence.authors: Buss W, Ford BA, Foo E, Spielmeyer W
evidence.evidence_sentence: Rht12 dwarf plants screened for tall suppressors; suppressors carry loss-of-function mutations in GA2oxidaseA13

evidence.title: Overgrowth mutants determine the causal role of gibberellin GA2oxidaseA13 in Rht12 dwarfism of wheat
evidence.authors: Buss W, Ford BA, Foo E, Spielmeyer W
evidence.evidence_sentence: Rht12, Rht18, and Rht14 share the same height-reducing mechanism
evidence.claim: Rht14 GA-responsive dwarf allelic with Rht18

evidence.title: Overgrowth mutants determine the causal role of gibberellin GA2oxidaseA13 in Rht12 dwarfism of wheat
evidence.authors: Buss W, Ford BA, Foo E, Spielmeyer W
evidence.evidence_sentence: tall overgrowth individuals contain loss-of-function mutations in GA2oxidaseA13
evidence.claim: TaGA2oxA13 LOF reverts Rht12 to tall

evidence.title: A natural variation in Ribonuclease H-like gene underlies Rht8 to confer Green Revolution trait in wheat
evidence.authors: Chai L, Xin M, Dong C, Chen Z, Zhai H, Zhuang J, Cheng X, Wang N, Geng J, Wang X, Jiang H, Hu Z, Xin M, Yao Y, Ni Z, Sun Q, Peng H
evidence.evidence_sentence: The Reduced height 8 (Rht8) semi-dwarfing gene reduces stature of wheat and improves lodging resistance, without compromising grain yield

evidence.title: An autoactive NB-LRR gene causes Rht13 dwarfism in wheat
evidence.authors: Borrill P, Mago R, Xu T, Ford B, Williams SJ, Derkx A, Bovill WD, Hyles J, Bhatt D, Xia XC, MacMillan C, Park RF, Karafiatova M, Dolezel J, Ayliffe M, Lagudah E, Spielmeyer W
evidence.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences USA
evidence.evidence_sentence: Rht-B13b plants exhibited approximately 17-34% height reduction primarily through shortened peduncle development

evidence.title: Induced variation in BRASSINOSTEROID INSENSITIVE 1 (BRI1) confers a compact wheat architecture
evidence.authors: Gill MS, Phillips AL, Tarkowska D, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: Triple mutants (with premature stop codons in all three TaBRI1 homoeologues) produced severe dwarfism, malformed leaves and sterility

evidence.title: Induced variation in BRASSINOSTEROID INSENSITIVE 1 (BRI1) confers a compact wheat architecture
evidence.authors: Gill MS, Phillips AL, Tarkowska D, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: Missense mutants in TaBRI1-A1 proved most promising: the less severe variant was 35% shorter than the wild type

evidence.title: Reducing brassinosteroid signalling enhances grain yield in semi-dwarf wheat
evidence.authors: Song L, Liu J, Cao B, Liu B, Zhang X, Chen Z, Dong C, Liu X, Zhang Z, Wang W, Chai L, Liu J, Zhu J, Cui S, He F, Peng H, Hu Z, Su Z, Guo W, Xin M, Yao Y, Yan Y, Song Y, Bai G, Sun Q, Ni Z
evidence.evidence_sentence: znf-bb (single): Shorter (8.4 cm); Slight reduction; no pleiotropy

evidence.title: Reducing brassinosteroid signalling enhances grain yield in semi-dwarf wheat
evidence.authors: Song L, Liu J, Cao B, Liu B, Zhang X, Chen Z, Dong C, Liu X, Zhang Z, Wang W, Chai L, Liu J, Zhu J, Cui S, He F, Peng H, Hu Z, Su Z, Guo W, Xin M, Yao Y, Yan Y, Song Y, Bai G, Sun Q, Ni Z
evidence.evidence_sentence: znf-bb rht1-bb (double): Similar to WT; Longer spikes, larger grains
evidence.claim: r-e-z double mutation similar to WT height with larger grains

evidence.title: The brassinosteroid biosynthesis gene TaD11-2A controls grain size and its elite haplotype improves wheat grain yields
evidence.authors: Xu H, Sun H, Dong J, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: The tad11-2a-1 mutant displayed dwarfism, smaller grains, sensitivity to 24-epiBL, and reduced endogenous BR contents

evidence.title: VRN1 regulates heading and plant height in wheat by activating gibberellin biosynthesis
evidence.authors: Liu T, Li D, Xie Z, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: the plant height of these mutants was reduced by 3.7-5 cm compared with that of Fielder
evidence.claim: VRN1-5A/B/D single homeolog KO reduces height 3.7-5 cm

evidence.title: VRN1 regulates heading and plant height in wheat by activating gibberellin biosynthesis
evidence.authors: Liu T, Li D, Xie Z, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: VRN1-5A/5B/5D redundantly regulate heading date and plant height in wheat
evidence.claim: VRN1 triple-KO delays flowering and dwarfs

evidence.title: Modulating plant growth-metabolism coordination for sustainable agriculture
evidence.authors: Li S, Tian Y, Wu K, Ye Y, Yu J, Zhang J, Liu Q, Hu M, Li H, Tong Y, Harberd NP, Fu X
evidence.evidence_sentence: increased GRF4 abundance boosts grain yield and NUE of rice and wheat GRVs without increasing mature plant height
evidence.claim: GRF4 OE does not increase mature height

evidence.title: Molecular characteristics and regulatory effects of dwarfing Rht genes in Triticum aestivum L
evidence.authors: Wang YR, Shi J, He YY, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: Rht3 | 4BS | GA-insensitive (DELLA) | ~64% reduction
evidence.claim: Rht3 severe dwarf; = Rht-B1c Tom Thumb allele

evidence.title: Molecular characteristics and regulatory effects of dwarfing Rht genes in Triticum aestivum L
evidence.authors: Wang YR, Shi J, He YY, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: Rht4 | 2BL | GA-responsive | ~12% reduction

evidence.title: Molecular characteristics and regulatory effects of dwarfing Rht genes in Triticum aestivum L
evidence.authors: Wang YR, Shi J, He YY, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: Rht5 | 3BS | GA-responsive (P450) | ~50% reduction

evidence.title: N-terminal truncated RHT-1 proteins generated by translational reinitiation cause semi-dwarfing of wheat Green Revolution alleles
evidence.authors: Van De Velde K, Thomas SG, Heyse F, Kaspar R, Van Der Straeten D, Rohde A
evidence.evidence_sentence: Expression of these N-terminal truncated proteins in transgenic lines demonstrated their ability to cause strong dwarfism
evidence.claim: N-terminal truncated RHT-1 OE causes strong dwarfism

evidence.title: Characterization and Expression Patterns of Auxin Response Factors in Wheat
evidence.authors: Qiao L, Zhang W, Li X, Zhang L, Zhang X, Li X, Guo H, Ren Y, Zheng J, Chang Z
evidence.evidence_sentence: Wheat seedlings treated with 10 μM α-naphthaleneacetic acid (synthetic auxin) showed differential upregulation and downregulation of specific TaARF members within 0.5-3 hours post-treatment

evidence.title: TaARF4 genes are linked to root growth and plant height in wheat
evidence.authors: Wang J, Wang R, Mao X, Li L, Chang X, Zhang X, Jing R
evidence.evidence_sentence: TaARF4-B was strongly associated with PH and root depth at the tillering, jointing and grain fill stages
evidence.claim: TaARF4-B variant haplotype associates with short plants

evidence.title: Two open reading frames of Rht-B1b acting as brake and throttle contributed to wheat Green Revolution
evidence.authors: Chen Y, Yang Z, Wang H, Xia C, Zhang L, Sun J, Kong X, Liu X
evidence.evidence_sentence: GA treatment failed to promote coleoptile elongation in Rht-B1b-containing lines, confirming the proteins function independently of GA-induced degradation pathways

evidence.title: GIBBERELLIN 3-OXIDASE genes regulate height and grain size in bread wheat
evidence.authors: Phillips AL, Huttly AK, Alarcon-Reverte R, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: GA biosynthetic genes are essential for normal height; chemical inhibition with paclobutrazol (GA biosynthesis inhibitor) phenocopies ga3ox2 dwarf
evidence.claim: Paclobutrazol blocks GA biosynthesis and reduces height

evidence.title: The brassinosteroid biosynthesis gene TaD11-2A controls grain size and its elite haplotype improves wheat grain yields
evidence.authors: Xu H, Sun H, Dong J, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: reduced BR biosynthesis resulted in smaller grains and stunted growth

evidence.title: Induced variation in BRASSINOSTEROID INSENSITIVE 1 (BRI1) confers a compact wheat architecture
evidence.authors: Gill MS, Phillips AL, Tarkowska D, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: 24-epiBL treatment on WT wheat promotes BR signaling and elongation
evidence.claim: Exogenous brassinolide promotes stem elongation in WT

evidence.title: Induced variation in BRASSINOSTEROID INSENSITIVE 1 (BRI1) confers a compact wheat architecture
evidence.authors: Gill MS, Phillips AL, Tarkowska D, et al
evidence.evidence_sentence: Triple mutants produced severe dwarfism; BR application unable to rescue BR-insensitive phenotype
evidence.claim: TaBRI1 triple-KO insensitive to exogenous BR
